title: Board view-model (4 columns, Awaiting lane, mouse drag)
description: Add the Board view-model (internal/tui/view_board.go): kanban with four columns Open / In Progress / Awaiting / Closed (Awaiting its own lane via IsAwaitingHuman), grouping the scoped set into columns with pure column renderers. Mouse drag between columns sets status through the shared edit.go write-path (from the editable-detail tick). Register via ONE-LINE append in registerViews(). Blocked-by editable-detail (needs edit.go) and timeline (serialize the registerViews edit). Files: internal/tui/view_board.go (new) + test; one-line registerViews append.
acceptance_criteria: unit: column assignment puts an awaiting tick in the Awaiting lane regardless of real status; drag msg sets status + writes via store; teatest golden: Board renders 4 columns; mouse-drag a card Open->In Progress updates column + tick
closed_reason: Completed: boardView 4-column kanban (Open/In Progress/Awaiting/Closed, Awaiting own lane); mouse drag maps to edit.go write-path; one-line registerViews append
